pyclbr/Class.name: Class
pyclbr/Class.description: Class Class instances describe classes defined by class statements. They have the same attributes as Functions and two more. file¶ Name of the file in which the class is defined. module¶ The name of the module defining the class described. name¶ The name of the class. lineno¶ The line number in the file where the definition starts. parent¶ For top-level classes, None. For nested classes, the parent. Added in version 3.7. children¶ A dictionary mapping names to descriptors for nested functions...
